on_screen_text: Priya: Priya yaar... Aaj neha ne mala reject kela [Priya... Today Neha rejected me] / Mi mhantla "i am loving you since long time" [I said "I am loving you since long time"] / Ti hasun mhantli "adhi neet english bolayla shik" [She laughed and said "first learn to speak English properly"] / Tithe dusre friends pan hote khup apman jhala maza [Other friends were also there, I felt very humiliated] / Arjun: Arjun, haar maan nako [Arjun, don't give up] / Mi pan aadhi tujhya sarkhi English bolayche [I also used to speak English like you before] / Pan MySivi app vapralya-pasun sagla badlun gelay. [But since using MySivi app, everything has changed.] / Priya: MySivi?? / Arjun: Ho! Ithe AI teacher Arya aahe [Yes! Here is AI teacher Arya] / Roz fakt 15 minute tichyashi bol, agdi mitra sarkha [Just speak with her for 15 minutes daily, just like a friend] / Chuk jhali? Judge nahi karat, fakt correct karte [Made a mistake? She doesn't judge, just corrects] / Priya: Mhanje ajun hi hope aahe?? [So there is still hope??] / Arjun: Nakkich! [Definitely!] / 2 week practice kar... tujhi English itki improve hoil ki Neha pan impress hoil [Practice for 2 weeks... your English will improve so much that even Neha will be impressed] / Priya: Pan he expensive asel na? [But this must be expensive, right?] / Arjun: Nahi, fakt ‑1! [No, just ‑1!] / Priya: Wow! Mi attaach download karto [Wow! I am downloading it right now] / 2 haftyanantar Neha la perfect English madhye propose karnaar [After 2 weeks, I will propose to Neha in perfect English] / Arjun: All the best! MySivi download kar ani suru kar [All the best! Download MySivi and start]
summary: A simulated WhatsApp chat in Marathi depicts a boy sharing his embarrassment after being rejected by his crush due to poor English. His friend recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teacher, a 15-minute daily practice routine, and an affordable price of just ‑1.
